meta.title: Speech & Language Therapy Screening | Eden ABA Therapy
meta.description: Complete Eden ABA Therapy's speech and language screening form. Share family concerns for intake review. This screening does not diagnose and does not replace evaluation by a licensed Speech-Language Pathologist.

title: Speech & Language Therapy Screening Form
intro: Share your family's concerns so Eden's intake team can review screening information and help determine appropriate next steps. This form does not diagnose and does not replace evaluation by a licensed Speech-Language Pathologist.

fields.signature: Parent / Guardian Signature (type full legal name) *

placeholders.concerns: Few words, unclear speech, difficulty following directions, stuttering, social communication, AAC needs, feeding concerns...
placeholders.aacDetails: Current device, picture system, sign use, etc.
placeholders.developmentalHistory: Prematurity, NICU stay, ear infections, prior therapy, medications, etc.

concernsLabel: What made you request speech or language support?
scoringNote: Scoring: No = 0, Sometimes = 1, Often = 2. This screening is not a diagnosis.

questions.understanding: Difficulty understanding questions, routines, or daily instructions?
questions.fewWords: Uses fewer words or shorter phrases than expected?
questions.frustration: Frustration, crying, or behavior because communication is hard?
questions.clarity: Unfamiliar people have trouble understanding your child?
questions.sounds: Leaves off sounds, substitutes sounds, or speaks unclearly?
questions.social: Difficulty with conversation, turn-taking, play, or peer interaction?
questions.gestures: Difficulty using gestures, shared attention, or communication repair?
questions.aac: Needs pictures, signs, gestures, or a communication device?
questions.fluency: Repeats sounds/words, gets stuck, or shows stuttering concerns?
questions.voice: Voice sounds hoarse, weak, strained, or unusual?
questions.swallowSafety: Coughing, choking, wet voice, or breathing changes during meals?
questions.feedingConcern: Very limited foods, gagging, vomiting, weight concerns, or texture refusal?

redFlagAlert: Because feeding or swallowing safety concerns were reported, Eden recommends prompt review by a qualified medical provider or licensed Speech-Language Pathologist.
consentPrivacyText: Information submitted through this form is used only to help Eden coordinate intake and screening follow-up. It is handled with privacy-conscious practices and is not shared for marketing purposes. Submission does not guarantee service approval or insurance authorization.
consentCheckbox: I understand this screening does not diagnose and does not replace evaluation by a licensed Speech-Language Pathologist. *
disclaimerText: This form does not diagnose a speech, language, feeding, or swallowing disorder. Feeding or swallowing safety concerns should be reviewed promptly by qualified medical professionals.

sidebar.submit: Submit Screening to Eden Intake Team

errors.parentName: Parent or guardian name is required.
errors.consent: You must acknowledge that this screening does not replace evaluation by a licensed Speech-Language Pathologist.
errors.signature: Parent or guardian signature is required.
errors.recaptchaFailed: Security verification failed. Please try again.
errors.submitFailed: Unable to submit your screening. Please try again.

success.title: Screening received
success.message: Thank you. Eden intake coordinator received your screening.
success.disclaimer: This screening does not diagnose a speech, language, feeding, or swallowing disorder and does not replace evaluation by a licensed Speech-Language Pathologist. Submission does not guarantee service approval or insurance authorization.

low.recommendation: Parent education and monitoring may be appropriate.

moderate.recommendation: A speech-language screening is recommended to determine if full evaluation is needed.

high.recommendation: A full speech-language evaluation is recommended based on reported concerns.

highSafety.recommendation: Because feeding or swallowing safety concerns were reported, Eden recommends prompt review by a qualified medical provider or licensed Speech-Language Pathologist.
